title: Tamuria deltoidea
taxonomy: Tamuria deltoidea is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. It is native to India and other parts of South Asia. The genus Tamuria is a monotypic genus, meaning it contains only one species. Further classification places Tamuria deltoidea within the tribe Zanthoxyleae. The exact classification and relationships of Tamuria deltoidea are still being researched by botanists.
